--- title: "172: Slope and streaks" date: "2026-02-05" categories: - geom_tile - scale_discrete format: html: code-fold: true code-summary: "Code" editor: visual --- ### Load data ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(rlang) # duke unc duke_unc <- readr::read_csv("duke-unc.csv") # find streaks find_streaks <- duke_unc |> dplyr::mutate( result = stringr::str_extract(Result, "^[WL]"), date_clean = stringr::str_split(Date, " ", simplify = TRUE)[,1], date = lubridate::ymd(date_clean), year = lubridate::year(date), winner = dplyr::case_when( result == "W" ~ "UNC", result == "L" ~ "Duke" ) ) |> dplyr::arrange(date) |> dplyr::mutate(game_num = dplyr::row_number()) data_with_streaks <- find_streaks |> dplyr::mutate( winner_changed = winner != dplyr::lag(winner, default = ""), streak_id = cumsum(winner_changed) ) |> dplyr::group_by(streak_id) |> dplyr::mutate( streak_length = dplyr::n(), streak_game_num = dplyr::row_number(), streak_start_date = min(date), streak_end_date = max(date), streak_start_year = lubridate::year(streak_start_date), streak_end_year = lubridate::year(streak_end_date) ) |> dplyr::ungroup() streak_summary <- data_with_streaks |> dplyr::group_by(streak_id) |> dplyr::summarise( winner = dplyr::first(winner), streak_length = dplyr::first(streak_length), streak_start_date = dplyr::first(streak_start_date), streak_end_date = dplyr::first(streak_end_date), streak_start_year = dplyr::first(streak_start_year), streak_end_year = dplyr::first(streak_end_year), games = paste(game_num, collapse = ", "), .groups = "drop" ) |> dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(streak_length), streak_start_date) # wab data wab <- readr::read_csv("wab_2025.csv") ``` ::: ### Duke-UNC plot ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} streak_data <- duke_unc |> dplyr::rename(location = `...4`) |> dplyr::mutate( result = stringr::str_extract(Result, "^[WL]"), date_clean = stringr::str_extract(Date, "^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}"), date = lubridate::ymd(date_clean), winner = dplyr::if_else(result == "W", "Carolina", "Duke") ) |> dplyr::arrange(date) # find more streaks streaks <- streak_data |> dplyr::mutate( streak_change = winner != dplyr::lag(winner, default = dplyr::first(winner)), streak_id = cumsum(streak_change) ) |> dplyr::group_by(streak_id) |> dplyr::summarise( winner = dplyr::first(winner), streak_length = dplyr::n(), start_date = min(date), end_date = max(date), .groups = "drop" ) # make the data for the plot tile_data <- streak_data |> dplyr::mutate( decade = paste0(floor(lubridate::year(date) / 10) * 10, "s") ) |> # only one game from 1949, so remove it dplyr::filter(decade != "1940s") |> # re-order, so recent decades are at the top dplyr::mutate( decade = forcats::fct_reorder(decade, lubridate::year(date), .desc = FALSE) ) |> dplyr::group_by(decade) |> dplyr::arrange(date) |> dplyr::mutate(game_num = dplyr::row_number()) |> dplyr::ungroup() # make the plot streak_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(tile_data, ggplot2::aes(x = game_num, y = decade, fill = winner)) + ggplot2::geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5, height = 0.45) + ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = c("Duke" = "#012169", "Carolina" = "#56a0d3"), name = "") + ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 30, 10), expand = c(0, 0)) + ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + ggplot2::labs( title = "Blue Streaks \nCarolina & Duke Since 1950", subtitle = "Each tile is one game in chronological order (left to right, grouped by decade), with the winning team shown in different shades of blue.
", x = "", y = "", caption = "data via sports-reference.com | Viz by Chris at Bless your chart" ) + hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum() + ggplot2::theme( plot.title = ggplot2::element_text( hjust = 0.5, size = 20, family = "Roboto Condensed" ), plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown( hjust = 0.5, size = 9.5, lineheight = 1.5, family = "Roboto Condensed" ), legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_blank(), axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14, family = "Roboto Condensed"), plot.caption = ggplot2::element_text( face = "plain", size = 8, family = "Roboto Condensed" ), panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(), panel.grid.major = ggplot2::element_blank(), plot.margin = ggplot2::margin( t = 10, r = 20, b = 10, l = 10 ) ) + # UNC logo (top) ggplot2::annotate( cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo, x = 28.35, y = 9.35, team = "North Carolina", height = 0.075, alpha = 0.8 ) + # UNC label (top) ggtext::geom_richtext( ggplot2::aes( x = 26, y = 7.75, label = "103 wins overall

LONGEST WIN STREAKS
8 (1972-74, 75-77)
7 (1993-1996)
6 (1959-60, 1982-84)
5 (1956-57)
4 (1967-68)
3 (Five times)" ), stat = "identity", fill = "#56a0d3", label.color = NA, color = "#0d3a5c", hjust = 0, size = 3, family = "Roboto Condensed", label.padding = ggplot2::unit(c(0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 0.4), "lines") ) + # Duke logo (bottom) ggplot2::annotate( cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo, x = 28.35, y = 6.05, team = "Duke", height = 0.070, alpha = 0.8 ) + # Duke label (bottom) ggtext::geom_richtext( ggplot2::aes( x = 26, y = 4.5, label = "92 wins overall

LONGEST WIN STREAKS
8 (1951-54)
7 (1962-1964)
6 (2001-03)
5 (1999-2000)
4 (2003-05, 2014-16)
3 (Six times, 2025-PRESENT)" ), stat = "identity", fill = "#012169", label.color = NA, color = "white", hjust = 0, size = 3, family = "Roboto Condensed", label.padding = ggplot2::unit(c(0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 0.4), "lines") ) + ggplot2::annotate( "text", x = 6.6, y = 8.65, label = "2022 \nFinal \nFour", family = "Roboto Condensed", size = 2.75, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold", color = "#56a0d3", ) + ggplot2::annotate( "text", x = 12.6, y = 8.65, label = "Duke \n3-game \nWin Streak", family = "Roboto Condensed", size = 2.75, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold", color = "#012169", ) ggplot2::ggsave("duke_unc_plot.png", streak_plot, w = 10.5, h = 7, dpi = 600, bg = "white", type = "cairo") ``` ::: ### Slope plot ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} wabnc <- wab |> dplyr::filter(game_type == "played") |> dplyr::group_by(team) |> dplyr::summarise( wab_non_conf = sum(wab[type == "nc"], na.rm = TRUE), wab_conf = sum(wab[type == "conf"], na.rm = TRUE) ) |> dplyr::mutate(diff = abs(wab_non_conf - wab_conf)) wabnc_long <- wabnc |> tidyr::pivot_longer( cols = c(wab_non_conf, wab_conf), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value" ) |> dplyr::mutate( metric = factor(metric, levels = c("wab_non_conf", "wab_conf")) ) # Define the two groups group1_teams <- c("N.C. State") group2_teams <- c("BYU") wabnc_long <- wabnc |> tidyr::pivot_longer( cols = c(wab_non_conf, wab_conf), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value" ) |> dplyr::mutate( metric = factor(metric, levels = c("wab_non_conf", "wab_conf")), highlight = dplyr::case_when( team %in% group1_teams ~ "group1", team %in% group2_teams ~ "group2", TRUE ~ "other" ) ) slope_plot <- wabnc_long |> ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = metric, y = value, group = team)) + ggplot2::geom_line(ggplot2::aes(color = highlight, size = highlight, alpha = highlight)) + ggplot2::geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = highlight, size = highlight, alpha = highlight)) + ggplot2::scale_color_manual( values = c("group1" = "lightgreen", "group2" = "lightpink", "other" = "gray70") ) + ggplot2::scale_size_manual( values = c("group1" = 1.2, "group2" = 1.2, "other" = 0.4) ) + ggplot2::scale_alpha_manual( values = c("group1" = 1, "group2" = 1, "other" = 0.3) ) + ggplot2::scale_x_discrete( labels = c("wab_non_conf" = "Non-Conference", "wab_conf" = "Conference"), position = "top" ) + hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum() + ggplot2::labs( title = "There is more than one way \nto build a tournament résumé", subtitle = "Shows difference in Wins-Above-Bubble (WAB) \nearned in non-conference play and league play.", x = "", y = "WAB", caption = "data via barttorvik.com \ndata through February 4 games\nViz by Chris at Bless your chart" ) + ggplot2::theme( plot.title = ggplot2::element_text( hjust = 0.5, size = 20, family = "Roboto Condensed" ), plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown( hjust = 0.5, size = 12.5, lineheight = 1.5, family = "Roboto Condensed" ), legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text( size = 14, family = "Roboto Condensed", face = "bold" ), axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text( size = 14, family = "Roboto Condensed", face = "bold"), axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text( size = 14, family = "Roboto Condensed", face = "bold"), plot.caption = ggplot2::element_text( face = "plain", size = 10, family = "Roboto Condensed" ) ) + ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") + ggplot2::annotate( cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo, x = 2.1, y = 2.36, team = "NC State", height = 0.055, alpha = 0.8 ) + ggplot2::annotate( "text", x = 2.2, y = 2.4, label = "+2.50", family = "Roboto Condensed", size = 4.5, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold", color = "lightgreen", ) + ggplot2::annotate( cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo, x = 0.9, y = -0.45, team = "NC State", height = 0.055, alpha = 0.1 ) + ggplot2::annotate( "text", x = 0.65, y = -0.45, label = "-0.22", family = "Roboto Condensed", size = 4.5, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold", color = "lightpink", ) + ggplot2::annotate( cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo, x = 2.1, y = 0.53, team = "BYU", height = 0.055, alpha = 0.1 ) + ggplot2::annotate( "text", x = 2.2, y = 0.53, label = "+0.53", family = "Roboto Condensed", size = 4.5, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold", color = "lightpink", ) + ggplot2::annotate( cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo, x = 0.9, y = 3.1, team = "BYU", height = 0.055, alpha = 0.9 ) + ggplot2::annotate( "text", x = 0.65, y = 3.10, label = "+3.10", family = "Roboto Condensed", size = 4.5, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold", color = "lightgreen", ) ggplot2::ggsave("slope_plot.png", slope_plot, h = 9, w = 7, dpi = 600, bg = "white", type = "cairo") ``` ::: ###
